title: Semi-Auto Tree Farm
description: A semi-automatic tree farm using pistons to harvest the bottom log of a tree, causing the rest to float and break. A sapling is replanted automatically by a dispenser or dropper with a bone meal dispenser to force instant growth. Commonly built for oak, birch, or spruce. The player triggers the harvest with a button; pistons break the base log, water streams collect the logs, and a hopper chain deposits them in a chest. Space saplings 1 block apart with 2+ blocks clearance above.
